client-onboarding-intake.problem: Pre-workshop client material collection is manual, fragmented, and unscalable
client-onboarding-intake.solution: The Interview + The Head Start — Guided intake flow with web-scraping pre-population

digital-storefront-at-scale.problem: 260+ practice digital storefront setup takes months per acquisition with no system for ongoing 365-day network-wide curation
digital-storefront-at-scale.solution: The Practice Concierge — Agent-first orchestration platform with per-practice AI concierge, data hub, template engine, channel sync, and network dashboard

full-funnel-visibility.problem: 75+ disconnected tech systems across 260+ practices create 30-day visibility lag into patient funnel health, preventing proactive intervention
full-funnel-visibility.solution: The Funnel OS — Full-stack unified patient funnel operating system with 3 layers (Data Integration, Intelligence, Experience), staged delivery from BI dashboard to full platform with Practice Nerve Center extending Practice Concierge
